response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development and leadership roles, but lacks the mandatory domain expertise or technical skills required for this role. While they have 5+ years of C++ experience, it is not recent (last direct C++ work was in 2015) and not on Windows platform. Their background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, scripting languages, and modern stacks (TypeScript, Node.js), with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle experience or capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals and leadership experience
Fluent in multiple languages and technologies
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development on Windows platform
No demonstrated domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income
